channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kaye Adams Will Not Return to BBC Scotland's 'Mornings With' Following Conduct Complaint
item.description: Kaye Adams, the BBC Scotland radio presenter, will not be returning to her BBC Scotland show, 'Mornings With', after an internal complaint regarding her conduct. The broadcaster confirmed her departur...

item.title: Instagram Bug Floods Users With Notifications From Unfollowed Accounts
item.description: Instagram users worldwide experienced an unexpected flood of story notifications today, with alerts coming from accounts they don’t follow. Starting around 6:40 AM EST on December 18, 2025, users bega...

item.title: Can AI Data Centers Be Built in Space to Solve Earth’s Cooling and Energy Problems?
item.description: As the demand for AI accelerates, so does the need for massive data centers that consume significant amounts of electricity and water. By 2028, AI servers could use up to 22% of the energy consumed by...

item.title: Trump's Attack on Iran Sparks Massive Regional Conflict with Global Repercussions
item.description: Donald Trump has made a bold and controversial decision to launch military action against Iran, aiming to overthrow the Iranian regime with the support of Israel. This move has escalated tensions in t...

item.title: Mamdani Criticises Trump’s Iran Strikes as ‘Illegal’ and Dangerous Escalation
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has condemned the recent military strikes on Iran, led by the United States and Israel, labelling them as ‘illegal’ and a ‘catastrophic escalation.’ His comments cam...

item.title: Ed Sheeran's Bertie Blossoms faces mounting debt amid UK pub crisis
item.description: Ed Sheeran's trendy Notting Hill restaurant, Bertie Blossoms, has become the latest casualty of Britain's ongoing pub crisis, with its debt rising to nearly £1.3 million. The restaurant, which opened ...

item.title: Lammy warns court backlog may keep rising despite reform package to ease pressure
item.description: Justice Secretary David Lammy has acknowledged that the crown court backlog in England and Wales is expected to continue rising despite a new package of reforms aimed at addressing mounting delays. Cu...

item.title: Researchers combine caffeine with CRISPR for potential cancer and diabetes treatments
item.description: Researchers at Texas A&M University have developed a groundbreaking method that combines caffeine with CRISPR gene editing technology. This approach, known as chemogenetics, allows scientists to preci...

item.title: Iran’s Supreme Leader Khamenei Killed in US-Israel Attack Amid Rising Middle East Tensions
item.description: Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, has been killed in an attack carried out by the United States and Israel, escalating tensions in the Middle East. Khamenei was reportedly at his office i...

item.title: SpaceX and Blue Origin Re-focus on Lunar Development Amid Pentagon's Golden Dome Initiative
item.description: In a surprising turn of events, SpaceX and Blue Origin have dramatically changed their space exploration priorities, shifting focus from Mars to the Moon. This change comes just as the Pentagon accele...

item.title: UK MPs Order Release of Government Files on Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor’s Trade Envoy Appointment
item.description: Members of Parliament have approved a motion compelling the UK government to release official documents related to Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor’s appointment as a trade envoy in 2001. The Liberal Democr...

item.title: A Simple Workout Routine for Longevity and Health: No Gimmicks Needed
item.description: In a world dominated by viral fitness trends, from snake yoga to extreme endurance events like Hyrox, many are led to believe that bizarre exercises are the key to staying fit and healthy. However, pu...

item.title: Disabled Woman Moved to Nursing Home Against Her Will Raises Concerns About NHS Care Decisions
item.description: Lucinda Ritchie, a 33-year-old disabled woman from Billingshurst, West Sussex, has spoken out after being moved to a nursing home against her will. Previously living independently in her adapted bunga...

item.title: A New Cellular Atlas Shows How Aging Affects the Body Across Multiple Organs
item.description: Scientists at Rockefeller University have created a groundbreaking cellular atlas that maps how aging affects cells in 21 organs of the body. This study, based on nearly 7 million cells from mice at d...

item.title: Olivia Dean wins big at the Brit Awards, securing four awards in a historic Manchester ceremony
item.description: Olivia Dean made history at the 2026 Brit Awards, winning four prestigious awards, including Best British Artist, Best Album for 'The Art of Loving', and Song of the Year for her collaboration with Sa...

item.title: The Bondi Beach Incident and Its Political Impact on Gaza's Ceasefire Timeline
item.description: The violent incident on Bondi Beach in Australia came at a critical time, coinciding with Israel's diplomatic efforts on Gaza's ceasefire. With a tense situation regarding the Gaza ceasefire, Israel w...

item.title: Heavy rains in Minas Gerais, Brazil cause floods and landslides killing 20
item.description: At least 20 people have died in the south-eastern Brazilian state of Minas Gerais after heavy rains on Monday evening triggered severe floods and multiple landslides. The city of Juiz de Fora reported...

item.title: Andy Burnham emerges as Labour leadership frontrunner after by-election defeat
item.description: Andy Burnham, the current mayor of Manchester, is seen as a strong contender to replace Sir Keir Starmer as Labour leader following the party's recent defeat in the Gorton and Denton by-election. Desp...

item.title: Olaplex Relaunches No.3Plus Complete Repair Treatment with New Formula
item.description: Olaplex has relaunched its iconic No.3 hair treatment under the name No.3Plus Complete Repair Treatment, featuring a new Damage Defense Cationic Complex. This updated formula is designed to deliver im...

item.title: How the UAE’s Advanced Missile Defense System Stopped Iranian Attacks
item.description: After a series of missile attacks launched by Iran in retaliation for Israeli and U.S. strikes, the UAE successfully activated its sophisticated missile defense systems. The interception, which took p...
